title: crepis polymorpha
intro: Crepis polymorpha, also known as the hairy hawk's beard or American hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crepis polymorpha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Crepis polymorpha can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
